creator: freebsd@moov.de
text:
Created attachment 243023
update resource_api to 1.8.14

This updates resource_api to the most recent version 1.8.14. (It's not the most recent version, but the most recent version available on rubygems.org.)

Changelog:
https://github.com/puppetlabs/puppet-resource_api/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md

This release fixes issues with more recent versions of Puppet for me, beside fixing a number of other bugs.

* QA successful: portlint
* QA successful: poudriere
